creator: schweikh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Broken PR. Subject doesn't seem to match body, no usable 
information, repeated audit trails referencing unrelated 
PRs and probably a -current problem which should be discussed 
in the mailing list and not using a PR. If the originator or 
whoever thinks this is worth a PR, please resubmit the PR.
